testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_with_single_pdf
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:130: in test_batch_stamp_with_single_pdf assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_with_multiple_pdfs
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:167: in test_batch_stamp_with_multiple_pdfs assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_rejects_non_pdf

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for non-PDF, got 403 assert 403 == 400 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:187: in test_batch_stamp_rejects_non_pdf assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for non-PDF, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for non-PDF, got 403 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_stamp_validates_file_count_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for exceeding limit, got 403 assert 403 == 400 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:205: in test_batch_stamp_validates_file_count_limit assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for exceeding limit, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for exceeding limit, got 403 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_prepare_document_with_pdf
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:305: in test_prepare_document_with_pdf assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_prepare_document_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 404 assert 404 in [400, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration66_batch_gotenberg.py:324: in test_prepare_document_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 404 E assert 404 in [400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
